output.sparql:
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?team ?ground ?population WHERE {
  ?division rdfs:label "Division One North" @en ; wdt:P31 wd:Q20459411 ; wdt:P361 wd:Q16909389 .
  ?team p:P552 [ ps:P552 ?division ; pq:P585 ?season ] .
  FILTER(YEAR(?season) >= 2018 && YEAR(?season) <= 2019)
  .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?team wdt:P1408 ?rank
  }
  .
  ?team wdt:P119 ?ground .
  ?ground wdt:P131 ?location .
  ?location wdt:P1082 ?population .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?population)
LIMIT 1
